headline: Cocoa Beach totally flat — 1' breaking into shore. Skimboard at high tide!
text: 7 AM high tide check at 31st Street — totally flat with 1 foot breaking into shore. Maybe something for a skimboard at high tide report time but that's about it. Looks like a little bump in the swell later this week. Stay tuned.
seoTitle: Cocoa Beach Surf Report — Monday April 27, 2026 | Flat 1ft, High Tide Skimboard
seoDescription: Cocoa Beach surf report Monday April 27: flat 1ft breaking into shore at Picnic Tables, 31st Street South Cocoa Beach. Skimboard conditions at high tide. Swell bump coming later this week.

headline: 1' nearshore with a SSW bump on the tiny line. Beautiful beach day!
text: Middle tide report from 31st Street — 1 foot breaking nearshore with SSW winds putting a bump on the tiny line. Not much to surf but an absolutely beautiful beach day at Cocoa Beach's best surf spot. Grab a towel and enjoy it.
seoTitle: Cocoa Beach Surf Report — Sunday April 26, 2026 | 1ft Nearshore, SSW Wind
seoDescription: Cocoa Beach surf report Sunday April 26: 1ft breaking nearshore at Picnic Tables, 31st Street. SSW winds, middle tide, beautiful beach day at South Cocoa Beach.

headline: 1' onshore mush — ESE winds killing it at Picnic Tables. Check back tomorrow morning.
text: Afternoon check at Cocoa Beach's best surf spot and conditions aren't doing us any favors right now. 1 foot breaking nearshore with onshore ESE winds making it messy and blown out. Not worth paddling out. We'll be back at first light tomorrow when winds typically go offshore — morning glass is always the move. Stay tuned.
seoTitle: Cocoa Beach Surf Report — Saturday April 25, 2026 | Onshore ESE, 1ft Nearshore
seoDescription: Cocoa Beach surf report for Saturday April 25: 1 foot nearshore surf with onshore ESE winds at Picnic Tables, South Cocoa Beach. Conditions poor. Checking again Sunday morning for better winds.

headline: 1' and very small breaking against shore. Great day to teach the kids!
text: Very small breaking against shore at 7 am. 1 foot and barely rideable but a beautiful morning at Cocoa Beach's best surf spot. If you've got groms that want to learn, today's the day — warm water, no current, and nothing to be afraid of. Athena approves.
seoTitle: Cocoa Beach Surf Report — Saturday April 25, 2026 | 1ft Nearshore, Beginner Friendly
seoDescription: Cocoa Beach surf report Saturday April 25: 1ft breaking against shore at Picnic Tables, South Cocoa Beach. Beginner friendly, warm water, great day for kids.

headline: 1-2' clean with fun sets. Aloha Friday — grab your longboard!
text: 8 AM low tide check — 1-2' breaking nearshore but some very fun sets coming through. West wind keeping it glassy and clean at Cocoa Beach's best surf spot. Beautiful Aloha Friday out there. Athena says get out there with your big boards.
seoTitle: Cocoa Beach Surf Report — Friday April 24, 2026 | 1-2ft Clean, West Wind Glass
seoDescription: Cocoa Beach surf report for Friday April 24: 1-2 foot clean waves at Picnic Tables, South Cocoa Beach. Offshore west winds, fun sets, great longboard conditions.
